content.fact_text: Implementation of the RegistrationController class for secure user sign-up.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides a secure HTTP controller for user registration, enforcing schema validation, correlation ID tracing, and error handling. It delegates business logic to a service layer and provides appropriate HTTP response codes (201, 400, 409, 500).
interfaces: handleError(res: Response, error: any, correlationId: string): void
provenance_data.utility: Handles incoming user registration HTTP requests, ensuring secure validation and structured logging before service delegation.
